name: ghost-doc
description: Ghost Doc — black-box runtime documentation tool. Hub server, CLI, and dashboard.

scripts.copy-dashboard: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const src=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'../dashboard/dist');const dest=path.resolve(process.cwd(),'public');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('[ghost-doc] dashboard copied to hub/public');}else{console.log('[ghost-doc] dashboard/dist not found — run dashboard build first');}"
